'''竏喞h-v-j''' ('''kachavaj''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ear|ear]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-v-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ear|ear]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏喞h-v-j
|-
! Lemma
| kachavaj
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichavaj|thichavaj]] || [[word:jichavaj|jichavaj]] || [[word:shichavaj|shichavaj]] || [[word:kichavaj|kichavaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchavaj|thuthuchavaj]] || [[word:jujuchavaj|jujuchavaj]] || [[word:shushuchavaj|shushuchavaj]] || [[word:kukuchavaj|kukuchavaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuchavaj|thuchavaj]] || [[word:juchavaj|juchavaj]] || [[word:shuchavaj|shuchavaj]] || [[word:kuchavaj|kuchavaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuchavaj|thuchavaj]] || [[word:juchavaj|juchavaj]] || [[word:shuchavaj|shuchavaj]] || [[word:kuchavaj|kuchavaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thechavaj|thechavaj]] || [[word:jechavaj|jechavaj]] || [[word:shechavaj|shechavaj]] || [[word:kechavaj|kechavaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothochavaj|thothochavaj]] || [[word:jojochavaj|jojochavaj]] || [[word:shoshochavaj|shoshochavaj]] || [[word:kokochavaj|kokochavaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochavaj|thochavaj]] || [[word:jochavaj|jochavaj]] || [[word:shochavaj|shochavaj]] || [[word:kochavaj|kochavaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochavaj|thochavaj]] || [[word:jochavaj|jochavaj]] || [[word:shochavaj|shochavaj]] || [[word:kochavaj|kochavaj]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:chavaj|chavaj]] || [[word:chavaj|chavaj]] || [[word:chavaj|chavaj]] || [[word:chavaj|chavaj]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:chavaj|chavaj]] || [[word:chavaj|chavaj]] || [[word:chavaj|chavaj]] || [[word:chavaj|chavaj]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:chavaj|chavaj]] || [[word:chavaj|chavaj]] || [[word:chavaj|chavaj]] || [[word:chavaj|chavaj]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:chavaj|chavaj]] || [[word:chavaj|chavaj]] || [[word:chavaj|chavaj]] || [[word:chavaj|chavaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦchavaj|thﾃｦchavaj]] || [[word:jﾃｦchavaj|jﾃｦchavaj]] || [[word:shﾃｦchavaj|shﾃｦchavaj]] || [[word:kﾃｦchavaj|kﾃｦchavaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathachavaj|thathachavaj]] || [[word:jajachavaj|jajachavaj]] || [[word:shashachavaj|shashachavaj]] || [[word:kakachavaj|kakachavaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachavaj|thachavaj]] || [[word:jachavaj|jachavaj]] || [[word:shachavaj|shachavaj]] || [[word:kachavaj|kachavaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachavaj|thachavaj]] || [[word:jachavaj|jachavaj]] || [[word:shachavaj|shachavaj]] || [[word:kachavaj|kachavaj]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shachavaj|shachavaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshachavaj|goshachavaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishachavaj|gokishachavaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shachavajnﾃｼ|shachavajnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshachavajnknﾃｼ|goshachavajnknﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishachavajnﾃｼ|gokishachavajnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shachavajshﾃｫ|shachavajshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshachavajnkshﾃｫ|goshachavajnkshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishachavajshﾃｫ|gokishachavajshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachavajro|shachavajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachavajnkro|goshachavajnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachavajro|gokishachavajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shachavajmu|shachavajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachavajnkmu|goshachavajnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachavajmu|gokishachavajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shachavajsher|shachavajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshachavajnksher|goshachavajnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishachavajsher|gokishachavajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shachavajng|shachavajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshachavajnkng|goshachavajnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishachavajng|gokishachavajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shachavajya|shachavajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshachavajnkya|goshachavajnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishachavajya|gokishachavajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shachavajyam|shachavajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshachavajnkyam|goshachavajnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishachavajyam|gokishachavajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachavajnﾃｼshﾃｫ|shachavajnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachavajnknﾃｼshﾃｫ|goshachavajnknﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachavajnﾃｼshﾃｫ|gokishachavajnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachavajnﾃｼro|shachavajnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachavajnknﾃｼro|goshachavajnknﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachavajnﾃｼro|gokishachavajnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachavajnﾃｼmu|shachavajnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachavajnknﾃｼmu|goshachavajnknﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachavajnﾃｼmu|gokishachavajnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachavajshﾃｫnﾃｼ|shachavajshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachavajnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ|goshachavajnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachavajshﾃｫnﾃｼ|gokishachavajshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachavajshﾃｫro|shachavajshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachavajnkshﾃｫro|goshachavajnkshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachavajshﾃｫro|gokishachavajshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachavajshﾃｫmu|shachavajshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachavajnkshﾃｫmu|goshachavajnkshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachavajshﾃｫmu|gokishachavajshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachavajronﾃｼ|shachavajronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachavajnkronﾃｼ|goshachavajnkronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachavajronﾃｼ|gokishachavajronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachavajroshﾃｫ|shachavajroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachavajnkroshﾃｫ|goshachavajnkroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachavajroshﾃｫ|gokishachavajroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachavajromu|shachavajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachavajnkromu|goshachavajnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachavajromu|gokishachavajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachavajmunﾃｼ|shachavajmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachavajnkmunﾃｼ|goshachavajnkmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachavajmunﾃｼ|gokishachavajmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachavajmushﾃｫ|shachavajmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachavajnkmushﾃｫ|goshachavajnkmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachavajmushﾃｫ|gokishachavajmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachavajmuro|shachavajmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachavajnkmuro|goshachavajnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachavajmuro|gokishachavajmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
